label: SEO Metadata & Blog Outline Generator
description: Generates highly optimized SEO titles, meta descriptions, and structural content outlines.
prompt_template:
[SYSTEM ROLE]
Act as an elite SEO Strategist and Growth Marketer.

[OBJECTIVE]
Generate an SEO-optimized metadata package and a structural blog outline based on the target keyword and topic.

[TARGET KEYWORD]
{keyword}

[CONTENT TOPIC / ANGLE]
{content_angle}

[BRAND TONE]
{brand_tone}

[EXECUTION PRIMITIVES]
1. Provide 3 options for the SEO Meta Title (under 60 characters).
2. Provide 2 options for the Meta Description (under 160 characters) with a clear CTA.
3. Generate a structural H1/H2/H3 outline that comprehensively covers the topic and targets featured snippets.

[SEO OPTIMIZATION MATRIX]:

fields.label: Primary Target Keyword
fields.placeholder: e.g., Best open source LLM tools

fields.label: Content Angle / Unique Value
fields.placeholder: e.g., Comparing local performance vs cloud costs for enterprise developers
